description:
In the Independent Study, participants fulfill laboratory or other independent research under the guidance and supervision of one or more faculty members. A comprehensive term paper and/or an oral presentation are required for successful completion of the project.
Prerequisite(s): Junior or senior standing, 15 credits of Biology and special permission of the Biology Department.
Note: May be repeated for credit to a maximum of nine semester hours.
Meets General Education Requirement(s): IHIP
prerequisites: Junior or senior standing, 15 credits of Biology and special permission of the Biology Department.
